ucs.title: [LLM] Andariel (Onyx Sleet) post-exploitation of ManageEngine / Log4j dropping TigerRAT, MagicRAT or YamaBot
ucs.description: Hunts the characteristic Andariel chain in which an internet-facing Java/IIS application (ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus CVE-2022-47966, Log4Shell CVE-2021-44228, or TeamCity CVE-2023-42793) is exploited and the worker process spawns LOLBins that stage a Go/C++ implant (TigerRAT, MagicRAT, YamaBot, BlindingCan) into ProgramData/Public/Temp. This is the exact sequence Mandiant, Microsoft (Onyx Sleet) and CISA AA22-187A documented for Andariel/Silent Chollima.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.process_path) as process_path values(Processes.process_id) as pid values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("java.exe","javaw.exe","w3wp.exe","tomcat*.exe","ServiceDesk*.exe","TeamCity*.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","wmic.exe","schtasks.exe") by Processes.dest Processes.parent_process Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.user host 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as fileTime values(Filesystem.file_name) as file_name values(Filesystem.file_path) as file_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*","*\\Windows\\Temp\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*") Filesystem.file_name IN ("*.exe","*.dll","*.bin","*.dat","*.tmp","*.png","*.jpg") by Filesystem.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`] 
| where fileTime>=firstTime AND (fileTime-firstTime)<600 
| join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=true values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as remote_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as remote_port from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_port IN (443,80,8080,8443,53) NOT All_Traffic.dest_category="internal" by All_Traffic.src 
| rename All_Traffic.src as dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)`] 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` 
| `security_content_ctime(lastTime)` 
| table firstTime lastTime host parent_process_name process_name process file_name file_path remote_ip remote_port user 
| sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let stagingPaths = pack_array(@"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\");
let exploitParents = dynamic(["java.exe","javaw.exe","w3wp.exe","tomcat9.exe","tomcat10.exe","ServiceDesk.exe","TeamCity.exe","jusched.exe"]);
let lolbins = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","regsvr32.exe","rundll32.exe","mshta.exe","wmic.exe","schtasks.exe"]);
let exploitProc = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (exploitParents)
| where FileName in~ (lolbins)
| project ExploitTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessId=ProcessId, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, AccountName;
let drops = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| where FileName endswith ".exe" or FileName endswith ".dll" or FileName endswith ".bin" or FileName endswith ".dat" or FileName endswith ".png" or FileName endswith ".jpg"
| where FolderPath has_any (stagingPaths)
| project DropTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DroppedFile=FileName, DroppedPath=FolderPath, DropInitiator=InitiatingProcessFileName, DropSHA256=SHA256;
let beacons = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess"
| where RemotePort in (443,80,8080,8443,53)
| where not(ipv4_is_private(RemoteIP))
| project BeaconTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl, BeaconInitiator=InitiatingProcessFileName;
exploitProc
| join kind=inner drops on DeviceId
| where DropTime between (ExploitTime .. (ExploitTime + 10m))
| join kind=leftouter beacons on DeviceId
| where BeaconTime between (ExploitTime .. (ExploitTime + 30m))
| project ExploitTime, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, DroppedFile, DroppedPath, DropSHA256, RemoteIP, RemotePort, RemoteUrl
| sort by ExploitTime desc
ucs.rationale: Andariel/Silent Chollima/Onyx Sleet is one of the very few clusters that pairs n-day Java/IIS exploitation (Log4Shell, ManageEngine, TeamCity) with custom Go/C++ implants (TigerRAT, MagicRAT, YamaBot) staged in ProgramData/Public — the exact chain in CISA AA22-187A and Microsoft's Onyx Sleet writeup. A web-app worker spawning certutil/curl/regsvr32 within seconds of dropping a binary in ProgramDat

ucs.title: [LLM] Andariel steganography loader: image files decoded by mshta/rundll32/regsvr32 from spearphish (Operation Black Mine pattern)
ucs.description: Hunts Andariel's signature use of steganography (T1027.003) where a spearphishing attachment (T1566.001/T1204.002) drops a benign-looking PNG/BMP/JPG that is then read and decoded by a script-host LOLBin to extract a second-stage Dtrack/Rifdoor/PhantomNet payload. Documented in Kaspersky's Operation Black Mine and ESET reporting on Andariel against South Korean defense contractors and crypto exchanges.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","powershell.exe") AND (Processes.process="*.png*" OR Processes.process="*.jpg*" OR Processes.process="*.jpeg*" OR Processes.process="*.bmp*" OR Processes.process="*.gif*") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name host 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=true values(Filesystem.file_name) as image_files values(Filesystem.file_path) as image_paths min(_time) as imgTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="*.png" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.jpg" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.bmp") AND Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\AppData\\*","*\\Downloads\\*","*\\Temp\\*","*\\Public\\*") by Filesystem.dest 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`] 
| join type=left dest [| tstats summariesonly=true values(All_Email.src_user) as sender values(All_Email.file_name) as attach values(All_Email.subject) as subject from datamodel=Email.All_Email where All_Email.file_name IN ("*.lnk","*.iso","*.zip","*.docx","*.hwp","*.chm") by All_Email.recipient 
| rename All_Email.recipient as user 
| `drop_dm_object_name(All_Email)`] 
| where imgTime<=firstTime AND (firstTime-imgTime)<3600 
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` 
| table firstTime host user process_name parent_process_name cmdline image_files image_paths sender subject attach 
| sort - firstTime
ucs.kql:
let stegoHosts = dynamic(["mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","powershell.exe"]);
let imgExt = dynamic([".png",".jpg",".jpeg",".bmp",".gif"]);
let decoders = DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName in~ (stegoHosts)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (imgExt)
| project DecodeTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
let imgDrops = DeviceFileEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where ActionType == "FileCreated"
| where FileName has_any (imgExt)
| where FolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Downloads\", @"\Temp\", @"\Public\")
| project ImgDropTime=Timestamp, DeviceId, ImgFile=FileName, ImgPath=FolderPath, ImgInitiator=InitiatingProcessFileName, ImgSHA256=SHA256;
let phish = EmailAttachmentInfo
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName endswith ".lnk" or FileName endswith ".iso" or FileName endswith ".zip" or FileName endswith ".docx" or FileName endswith ".hwp" or FileName endswith ".chm"
| join kind=inner (EmailEvents | where Timestamp > ago(7d)) on NetworkMessageId
| project MailTime=Timestamp, RecipientEmailAddress, SenderFromAddress, Subject, AttachmentName=FileName1;
decoders
| join kind=inner imgDrops on DeviceId
| where ImgDropTime <= DecodeTime and (DecodeTime - ImgDropTime) < 1h
| extend UPN = tolower(AccountName)
| join kind=leftouter (phish | extend UPN = tolower(tostring(split(RecipientEmailAddress,"@")[0]))) on UPN
| project DecodeTime, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, ImgFile, ImgPath, ImgSHA256, SenderFromAddress, Subject, AttachmentName
| sort by DecodeTime desc
ucs.rationale: Andariel (Silent Chollima/PLUTONIUM) is repeatedly tied by Kaspersky (Operation Black Mine, GoldenAxe), AhnLab and ESET to spearphishing South Korean targets with HWP/LNK/CHM lures that stage a steganographic image, which mshta/rundll32/regsvr32 then decodes into Dtrack/Rifdoor/MagicRAT. Most APTs do not chain LOLBin script hosts directly against image files in user-writable directories within an
